alnajm manufacturing jsc — pdpl retention and transfer workflow note (ksa)
scope: issuer support and investor-relations drafts on dse rules; compliance aligned with cmoc guidance, pdpl art. basics (identifying a natural person directly or indirectly)
data categories: iqama/national id labels, commercial registration (crn), role mailboxes, investor helpline transcripts; no personal mobile numbers collected
example placeholders only: iqama: 12-XX-0000-0000 (invalid), national id: XXXX-9999-XXXX, crn: 0000000000; these fields are masked on entry
sources: public prospectus dated 2023-05 on our website, stale research notes, supplier onboarding forms; board memo and term-sheet drafts stored in restricted drive
retention: iqama/crn scans retained 180 days post-verification then redacted; ir drafts 90 days then archived without pii; logs 12 months
transfers: limited export to kingdom data authority sandbox (kda-xfr-0000 placeholder) for compliance testing; standard contractual clauses adapted to local pdpl and internal adequacy checklists
pm note: internal codename field is blank by design; non-public issuer language is flagged and routed to legal before circulation
positive span: a draft investor-relations note references a definitive agreement under review, marked non-public until embargo date 2026-12-31 08:00 AST
negated mac language: nothing in the draft constitutes or evidences a mac/mae; counsel confirms no material adverse change has occurred
public/stale: prior earnings call (2024-02) and the percentage breakdowns therein are public and remain the sole basis for external messaging
dsar: submit access/erasure requests to privacy@alnajm-jsc.example; we will not action requests sent to personal emails or posted on social media
security: tokenization of id fields, role-based access, and manual purge checklists; invalid identifier patterns are rejected at intake
out-of-scope: spa-day vouchers for the team wellness event handled by palm oasis wellness llc are processed separately and never merged with issuer or market files
